holdings.infoBox: REXC is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are MP Materials stock at 19.33%, Lynas Rare Earths at 18.31%, USA Rare Earth at 7.63%, Neo Performance Materials at 5.42%, and Iluka Resources at 5.04%.

overview.description: The Sprott Rare Earths Ex-China ETF (REXC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq Sprott Rare Earths Ex-China index. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index of global companies across developed, emerging, and frontier markets tied to rare earths used in advanced technologies. The fund targets stocks that derive at least 25% of their revenue or assets from activities within the rare earths ecosystem REXC was launched on Apr 14, 2026 and is issued by Sprott.
infoTable: Nasdaq Sprott Rare Earths Ex-China Index
